debug_info.goal:
U : Type
h : ctble U
A : Set U
⊢ ctble ↑A

proof:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  use f ∘ Subtype.val
  define
  intro a1 a2 heq
  have hval : a1.val = a2.val := hf (a1.val) (a2.val) heq
  exact Subtype.ext hval
